question: Was the average average temperature in United States (B) higher than in Australia (A)?

options.C: Both had the lowest values among all regions
options.D: They had equal values over the period

explanation: United States or Australia appears grey on the map, which represents missing data, not a true value. Since one of the regions has no data, we cannot reliably compare their values, even though the color scale may tempt viewers to do so.
